annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under 12 O.S. Sec. 727.1 — 4.13% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Oklahoma’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-01-02; verify at oscn.net. Not legal advice.
